events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from Chinese Hospital for client 1142. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: cardiovascular. Allergies: none. Sodium ceiling 600 mg/meal, carbs 45–75 g/meal. Prefers Chinese; dislikes eggplant, pork. Cooking ability: microwave. 5 meals/week, zone Tenderloin.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Vegetable Stir-Fry with Tofu
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 44 g outside 45–75 g range.

events.title: Rejected: Beef and Broccoli with Brown Rice
events.detail: Excluded — diet order 'cardiovascular': meal lacks 'heart-healthy' tag.

events.title: Matched: Winter Melon Soup with Chicken and Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 354/600 mg ✓, carbs 45 g (target 45–75) ✓.

events.title: Matched: Chicken Congee with Scallions
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 364/600 mg ✓, carbs 49 g (target 45–75) ✓. Sourced from kitchen batch B2.

events.title: Matched: Steamed Fish with Ginger and Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 435/600 mg ✓, carbs 50 g (target 45–75) ✓.

events.title: Batch allocated: Chicken Congee with Scallions
events.detail: Serving drawn from scheduled batch B2 (100 servings, 7 labor hours on 2026-07-20).

events.title: Donation D002 feeds batch B2
events.detail: Fresh Bok Choy (cases), Carrots (25 lb bags) from Bay Area Produce Exchange — triaged as kitchen ingredient.

events.title: Route assigned
events.detail: Client 1142 added to route R-TEND-2 (Tenderloin), delivery 2026-07-21, window 12:00–14:00. Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1142: 5 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 1. 0 hard-constraint violations.
